subcodes.first_line: O spiritual son! Thy letter was received and information was obtained regarding the attraction of the hearts of the friends in Clifton [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر روحانی نامه تو رسید و بر انجذاب قلوب احبای کلفتن اطلاع حاصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
